top_signals.title: Emerging Currencies Snap Winning Streak as Peace Deal in Doubt
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies snapped an eight-day winning streak on Monday as hopes faded for an imminent peace deal, even though President Donald Trump tried to calm market jitters by saying talks with Iran are moving at a “rapid pace.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: HM Treasury: 2026 COVID-19 Cost Tracker update
top_signals.summary: Official Statistics on the cost of measures announced in response to the COVID-19 pandemic and how much the government has spent on these measures so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Money in the digital age
Five things to look out for while getting lost in Takanawa
top_signals.summary: It's not easy to navigate the sprawling new redevelopment complex in what JR East calls the Greater Shinagawa Area, but here are a number of themes to help guide you.

top_signals.title: Takanawa Gateway’s latest landmark is still working on its own story
top_signals.summary: The museum's programming may lack focus, but its open spaces already offer Tokyoites a reason to stop in.

top_signals.title: Ramaco Resources, REalloys ink offtake MoU for rare earths carbonate from Brook mine
top_signals.summary: Brook mine in Wyoming holds what is believed to be the nation’s largest unconventional deposit of rare earth elements and critical minerals sourced from coal and carbonaceous ore.
